title: gh-148074: Fix `typeobject.c` missing error return
author: Wulian233
body:
> At line 9314-9320, `PyErr_Format` sets a `SystemError` for invalid `tp_dictoffset` but falls through to `return 0` (success). Type finishes initialization with invalid offset and pending exception. Requires C extension to trigger.

I think we can skip-news

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-148074 -->
* Issue: gh-148074
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Thanks @Wulian233 for the PR, and @kumaraditya303 for merging it 🌮🎉.. I'm working now to backport this PR to: 3.14.
🐍🍒⛏🤖

comments.author: bedevere-app[bot]
comments.body: [GH-148095](https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/148095) is a backport of this pull request to the [3.14 branch](https://github.com/python/cpython/tree/3.14).

comments.author: bedevere-bot
